================================ FAILURES ===================================
___________ StatisticsTest::test_mean_empty_list ____________

Lib/test/test_statistics.py:84: in test_mean_empty_list
    self.assertRaises(StatisticsError, mean, [])
AssertionError: StatisticsError not raised

The mean() function was expected to raise StatisticsError when called with
an empty list. Instead it returned 0 without raising an exception.
This indicates the empty input guard was removed or bypassed.
